setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added two additional test cases to improve coverage of UnitTest1 class, focusing on constructor and method behavior
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more meaningful implementation to Test1() method to enable more comprehensive testing
fileReports.note: Current implementation is minimal and lacks specific business logic

fileReports.summary: Added 2 new test cases to improve coverage of ProducerWrapper, focusing on edge cases like long messages and invalid configuration
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Implement logging mechanism instead of direct Console.WriteLine
keyImprovements: Added test for long message production
Added test for invalid bootstrap servers configuration
fileReports.note: Ensure Confluent.Kafka package is installed and configured correctly

fileReports.summary: Added 2 new test cases to improve coverage of edge cases in ConsumerWrapper, focusing on null message handling and exception resilience during disposal.
recommendations: Consider adding a timeout configuration parameter to readMessage method
Implement more robust error logging in exception handling paths
Add integration tests with actual Kafka configuration
keyImprovements: Verified exception handling during Dispose method
fileReports.note: Existing test suite already provides comprehensive coverage of ConsumerWrapper

fileReports.summary: Added 2 new test cases to validate product name length and quantity handling
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes to properties
Implement input validation in the OrderRequest constructor
Add more boundary testing for quantity and product name
keyImprovements: Verified handling of negative quantity values
fileReports.note: Existing test coverage is already quite comprehensive

fileReports.summary: Added 3 new test cases to improve code coverage, focusing on error handling and edge cases
recommendations: Add more comprehensive input validation tests
Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more robust error handling in the controller
keyImprovements: Added test for producer exception handling
fileReports.note: Ensure ProducerWrapper and OrderRequest are properly mocked and configured
